title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: How can democracy and civic engagement be strengthened?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two measures would be most effective at strengthening democracy.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about how democracy and civic engagement can be strengthened.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two measures are most effective.
